title: Comparing CNN with Gradient Boosting Machines (GBM) for Protein Expression Prediction
scientific_hypothesis: GBM will perform better than CNN in predicting sfGFP expression from 96nt DNA sequences.
required_controls: fixed per-series held-out sets for evaluation
mean of 5 MC-CV repeats for primary metric (R²)
expected_failure_modes: GBM may not outperform CNN due to the specific structure of DNA sequences and the complexity required for capturing spatial hierarchies.
